topic: How many people judge a business's credibility by its website

script.hook: 75% judge your business by your website.
beats: Not your product. Not your reviews. Your website makes the first call.
If it looks cheap or outdated, they leave before you even know they visited.
High Desert businesses lose customers every day to a bad first impression.
script.cta: DM us SITE. Let's fix it.
